author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 | Official Teaser 2
Look alive, choom — Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming your way this Fall!

Gear up for a return to the world of Cyberpunk, where only the ruthless survive and one wrong move can get you flatlined. This standalone story throws a fresh cast of characters into the darkest corners of Night City and brings a raw, gritty take on the world of the future. Lawless and unforgiving, this is Night City at its most brutal. 

Brought to you by CD PROJEKT RED and TRIGGER, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, SSSS.Gridman), with Kanno Ichigo (Promare, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) as the lead designer and Hugo Award winner Bartosz Sztybor as showrunner, story writer, and producer.

TRAILER MUSIC
Original Score by Tsuneo Imahori
“You Can't Run From Me” — written by Maria Kelly and Drew Polovick, performed by Rico Nasty, produced by Drew Polovick, mixed and mastered by Elliot Polokoff

Coming to Netflix, Fall 2026. 

#cyberpunkedgerunners #edgerunnerss2 #cyberpunkanime #anime #netflix 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
BEST EVO 2026 Trailers
Evo 2026 brought us so many trailers!

We saw several reveals, including the final team in Marvel Tokon Fighting Souls featuring Deadpool, Loki and Blade, Bob in Tekken 8, Robo-Ky’s gameplay trailer in Guilty Gear -Strive-, Lux and Samira reveals in 2XKO, the Bakunawa Killer reveal in Virtua Fighter Crossroads, and more. See timestamps below!

Intro - 0:00
Marvel Tokkon Fighting Souls Blade, Loki, Deadpool Reveal Trailer - 0:02
King of Fighters XV Update 2.0 Trailer - 2:40
Virtua Fighter Crossroads Bakunawa Killer Trailer - 3:40
Tekken 8 Bob Reveal Trailer - 4:50
2XKO Lux and Samira Reveal Trailer - 8:31
Invicible VS Season 1 Launch Trailer - 9:22
Blazblue Central Fiction Trinity Glassfille Trailer - 10:50
Rivals of Aether II Mina The Hollower Trailer - 12:24
Rivals of Aether II Gouie Trailer - 12:54

Under Night In-Birth II Sys: Celes Zohar Reveal - 16:20
Grandblue Fantasy Versus Rising ID Teaser - 17:47
Avatar Legends The Fighting Game Pre-Order Trailer - 20:04

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
MARVEL Tōkon Fighting Souls - Blade, Loki, and Deadpool Gameplay Reveal Trailer
The Samurai Outriders slash their way through MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls! 

The fifth team entering the Challenge of the Champion is led by Robbie Reyes as Ghost Rider, and features three new playable characters: Blade, Deadpool, and Loki!

Beta will be available July 24-26, 2026.

Coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!

#marveltokonfightingsouls #deadpool #evo2026

The so-called "Bakunawa Killer" has been tied to a series of violent attacks throughout Vilasapara.

It seems Pai Chan has been searching for him, but why...
